title: [OM][Python][Windows] Build broken unresolved signals
body:
```
FAILED: tools/circt/python_packages/circt_core/circt/_mlir_libs/_circt.cp311-win_amd64.pyd

LINK: command "C:\BuildTools\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.29.30133\bin\Hostx64\x64\link.exe /nologo tools\circt\lib\Bindings\Python\CMakeFiles\CIRCTPythonModules.extension._circt.dso.dir\CIRCTModule.cpp.obj tools\circt\lib\Bindings\Python\CMakeFiles\CIRCTPythonModules.extension._circt.dso.dir\ESIModule.cpp.obj tools\circt\lib\Bindings\Python\CMakeFiles\CIRCTPythonModules.extension._circt.dso.dir\HWModule.cpp.obj tools\circt\lib\Bindings\Python\CMakeFiles\CIRCTPythonModules.extension._circt.dso.dir\OMModule.cpp.obj tools\circt\lib\Bindings\Python\CMakeFiles\CIRCTPythonModules.extension._circt.dso.dir\MSFTModule.cpp.obj tools\circt\lib\Bindings\Python\CMakeFiles\CIRCTPythonModules.extension._circt.dso.dir\SVModule.cpp.obj /out:tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.cp311-win_amd64.pyd /implib:tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.lib /pdb:tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.pdb /dll /version:0.0 /machine:x64 /INCREMENTAL:NO -LTCG tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\CIRCTBindingsPythonCAPI.lib C:\Program Files\Python311\libs\python311.lib C:\Program Files\Python311\libs\python311.lib lib\LLVMSupport.lib psapi.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib uuid.lib advapi32.lib delayimp.lib -delayload:shell32.dll -delayload:ole32.dll lib\LLVMDemangle.lib kernel32.lib user32.lib gdi32.lib winspool.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib uuid.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib /MANIFEST /MANIFESTFILE:tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.cp311-win_amd64.pyd.manifest" failed (exit code 1120) with the following output:
   Creating library tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.lib and object tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.exp
OMModule.cpp.obj : error LNK2001: unresolved external symbol "public: class llvm::StringRef __cdecl mlir::StringAttr::getValue(void)const " (?getValue@StringAttr@mlir@@QEBA?AVStringRef@llvm@@XZ)
OMModule.cpp.obj : error LNK2001: unresolved external symbol "public: class llvm::ArrayRef<class mlir::Attribute> __cdecl mlir::ArrayAttr::getValue(void)const " (?getValue@ArrayAttr@mlir@@QEBA?AV?$ArrayRef@VAttribute@mlir@@@llvm@@XZ)
OMModule.cpp.obj : error LNK2001: unresolved external symbol "private: static class mlir::SelfOwningTypeID mlir::detail::TypeIDResolver<class mlir::ArrayAttr,void>::id" (?id@?$TypeIDResolver@VArrayAttr@mlir@@X@detail@mlir@@0VSelfOwningTypeID@3@A)
OMModule.cpp.obj : error LNK2001: unresolved external symbol "private: static class mlir::SelfOwningTypeID mlir::detail::TypeIDResolver<class mlir::StringAttr,void>::id" (?id@?$TypeIDResolver@VStringAttr@mlir@@X@detail@mlir@@0VSelfOwningTypeID@3@A)
tools\circt\python_packages\circt_core\circt\_mlir_libs\_circt.cp311-win_amd64.pyd : fatal error LNK1120: 4 unresolved externals
```

The Windows python build is broken. OMModule is missing a dependency.
